text: A traffic light is standing on the side of a red brick building.
Three boys playing baseball on a field with fences around it.
A frosted dessert sitting on a plate and napkin.
A kitchen floor covered in blood and a blender filled with even more blood.
A man in a suit and tie sitting at a dining table.
Several trains parked on tracks near a building.
A ghostly skateboarder balances on 2 wheels atop a plywood step.
Woman walking through walk with suitcase and smiling for camera.
A group of five people enjoying a white water rafting experience
A woman washing carrots on a counter in a kitchen.
